title: SSA Bookmarklet / Share Payload
description: Contract for data sent from the browser bookmarklet / mobile share sheet into Suka Smart Assistant (SSA). This is the FIRST object SSA receives before ImportService → ImportRouter → domain parsers → ImportNormalizer → automation → (optional) Hub export.

version.description: Semantic or date-stamped version for the bookmarklet/share payload shape.

source.description: Client or integration that produced this payload.

familyFundMode.description: If true, SSA MAY immediately format a Hub-facing packet **in addition** to local processing. SSA still owns the data first.

payload.description: Domain-specific import data captured from the current page / app.

url.description: Original page/video URL that the user shared.

domain.description: Hint for ImportRouter about what kind of data this is. Router may override this if it detects something else.

title.description: Best-effort page or item title at time of share.

description.description: Best-effort long text found on the page (meta description, social description, first paragraphs, video description, etc.).

html.description: Optional raw HTML captured at share-time for SSA to deep-parse if needed.

textSelection.description: Optional text the user highlighted before invoking the bookmarklet.

images.description: Images found on the page that may help parsers (recipe hero image, garden plan image, cleaning routine screenshot, etc.).

structuredData.description: Raw JSON-LD / microdata blobs scraped from <script type="application/ld+json"> or similar tags.

video.description: If the shared page is a video/how-to, provide best-effort video metadata so ImportRouter can send it straight to videoParser.

platform.description: youtube | tiktok | instagram | facebook | twitter | generic

hashtags.description: Hashtags extracted from video description to become SSA tags.

recipe.description: If the bookmarklet can already see a schema.org Recipe, send it here so SSA can skip HTML scraping.

cleaning.description: Structured daily/weekly/monthly/zone routines captured from the page.

garden.description: Garden plan or seed packet captured by the bookmarklet.

animal.description: Animal acquisition / care / butchery data detected on the page.

storehouse.description: Storehouse / pantry / long-term stock planning content captured from the page.

notes.description: Optional user-authored notes taken right in the bookmarklet/share UI (e.g. 'we like this marinade, add to meal plan').

capturedAt.description: Client-side ISO timestamp for when the share happened.

clientHints.description: Hints for SSA import stack about how to treat this import.

preferDomain.description: If the user explicitly said 'treat this as cleaning', it's set here.

autoSchedule.description: Client suggests SSA should immediately request scheduling for generated sessions (respects user settings).

showPreview.description: Client suggests SSA should pop the ImportPreviewModal right away.

meta.description: Transport-level metadata that SSA can log/trace but that is not domain content.

clientTimezone.description: IANA or offset, e.g. America/Chicago or -06:00

language.description: User language at share time, e.g. en-US

sessionId.description: Client-side session token to correlate multiple shares from same user.

payload.title: Chicken Tikka Masala
payload.description: This is a creamy tomato-based curry...

payload.title: How to Deep Clean Your Oven
payload.description: In this video I show you how to deep clean your oven. #cleaning #kitchen
